title: Too Much Money
writer: Joseph F. Poland, Jack Jungmeyer, Ralph Spence
actors: Lewis Stone, Anna Q. Nilsson, Robert Cain
plot: Millionaire Robert Broadley, in order to curb his wive's enthusiasm for spending money foolishly, inform her that he is now broke and penniless, which might have been a good plan if a friend of his, with some crooked ways, hadn't ...
